About Cary Hormone 02
This page was not captured by the external brief pipeline.
pages.homepage_text:
Transform your hormonal health. Feel like you again.
Take control of your hormone health with science-backed, individualized treatments.
Imagine waking up feeling like yourself again… Better yet, imagine experiencing a sense of wellbeing you didn’t even know was possible.
Testosterone, Estrogen, and Progesterone each have over 500 functions within your body. As your hormones decline, your vitality declines. If you don’t have enough of the hormones your body needs, it can’t function properly.
Cary Hormone 02 specializes in Bioidentical Hormone Replacement Therapy (BHRT), providing an all-natural and highly personalized approach to care that supports your preventative health and restores balance in your daily life.
You might be wondering—what is BHRT?
What is BHRT?
BHRT is the exact molecule our body produces, so it knows how to use and metabolize like our own. Testosterone, Estradiol and Progesterone have over 500 functions each in our body. If we don't have enough, our bodies will not work properly. Top reasons why we see people every day: fatigue, brain fog, sleep issues, anxiety, and depression. Also, BHRT acts preventative, protecting our brains from dementia, heart from heart attacks, bones from osteoporosis. A two fold effect, of day to day symptoms, and long-term.
What do BHRT pellets do?
At Cary Hormone 02, we specialize in BHRT pellets. Bioidentical Hormone Replacement Therapy is a treatment administered via additive and preservative-free pellets.
These pellets are identical to the molecules your body naturally produces and gradually releases into your bloodstream to create steady, consistent hormone levels. When hormones reach the body’s optimal ranges, you feel relief from the symptoms that are currently disrupting your life.
Why do our hormones matter?
Hormones are foundational to your overall health. When brought back into balance, you’ll experience transformative, whole body wellness.
BHRT for Men
Are you experiencing fatigue, brain fog, trouble sleeping, exhaustion, lack of motivation, or just not feeling like yourself? BHRT helps restore balance so you can feel stronger, sharper, and more like you again.
BHRT for Women
Are you struggling with fatigue, brain fog, trouble sleeping, lack of motivation, or symptoms related to perimenopause or menopause? Hormonal imbalance could be the issue at hand. BHRT replenishes what’s missing so you can regain stability, energy, and control over your health.
Wellness Program
Holistic health requires a comprehensive approach including nutrition, fitness, and self-care. We provide personalized guidance on diet, supplements, and lifestyle to optimize your hormone health and cultivate long-term wellness.
Tailored to answer the root cause of your symptoms.
With more than a decade of industry experience, we support you by providing personalized treatment plans clinically proven to resolve symptoms and noticeably improve your quality of life.

An Optimal Approach to Hormone Health
We believe medical care should extend far beyond temporary relief. The foundation of our health is hormones — and when balanced, they provide lasting well-being for our patients. Every patient care plan begins with comprehensive lab work and a detailed understanding of your symptoms, health history, and goals.
This patient-first philosophy continues the vision that shaped Cary Hormone 02 from the beginning, delivering science-based care designed to help people live healthier, more vibrant lives. By combining hormone therapy with guidance on nutrition, lifestyle, and overall wellness, we address the root causes of symptoms so you can achieve whole-body health.
the Owner, FACOG
Medical Director
Throughout his 30 years as a practicing OB/GYN, the Owner the Owner patients struggling with debilitating symptoms caused by hormonal imbalances. Frustrated by conventional medicine falling short of the patient’s needs, he sought a better solution — which led him to Bioidentical Hormone Replacement Therapy (BHRT).
After researching and seeing its profound impact firsthand, he founded Cary Hormone 02 in 2012 to offer BHRT as a science-backed, patient-first alternative to the status quo in medicine. Since then, the Owner the Owner team have helped thousands of people restore balance, regain vitality, and take control of their long-term health.
Wellness starts with knowledge.
